title: phalaris bulbosa var. hirtiglumis
intro: Phalaris bulbosa var. hirtiglumis, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Phalaris bulbosa var. hirtiglumis include its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and relieve pain. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary tract infections. Phalaris bulbosa var. hirtiglumis can be prepared as a decoction, where the plant material is boiled in water to create a tea that can be consumed for medicinal purposes.
